title: Dinner: Wafer/barquillo sandwich with ice cream (or cream), fresh raspberries, and a sliver of dark chocolate [Cumulative Dinner: ~45g carbs total] [Coach: A sweet little dessert sandwich 🍦 — fast carbs from the wafer and cream, raspberries add fiber. Cumulative dinner is climbing; sleep well and let the body settle.]

Dinner: Plate of cecina (cured beef) and jamón serrano with fried potato wedges [Coach: Cecina from León — leaner than jamón, packed with protein 🥩. Paired with jamón serrano and modest potatoes, this should land softly. A walk before bed would polish it off.]

Lunch: Garbanzos con callos (chickpea and tripe stew), side salad of lettuce, tomato, and cucumber, and a chunk of rustic baguette [Coach: Garbanzos con callos, a Madrileño classic 🫘 — chickpeas bring fiber and plant protein, callos stacks even more protein, side salad covers non-starchy veg beautifully. Hearty carbs but well-balanced; an after-lunch walk will keep things steady.]

Breakfast: Open-faced toast with jamón and manchego cheese, with half a plain yogurt [Coach: Solid protein-forward plate 🧀 — jamón and cheese stack the protein, half yogurt adds more plus gut-friendly probiotics, modest bread anchors it. Late breakfasts ride a bit higher with dawn cortisol; a walk after would help cap the peak.]

Dinner: Small bowl of gazpacho (or salmorejo) and a jamón roll/montadito [Coach: Lovely Spanish dinner 🍅 — gazpacho brings non-starchy veg and hydration, jamón adds protein. Bread is the carb anchor. Should land in a friendly range.]

Lunch: Egg-and-mashed-potato scramble (revuelto con patata), an egg in tomato sauce (huevo a la flamenca style), sliced avocado, and 2 small slices of rustic bread [Coach: A hearty plate 🍳 — eggs and avocado bring the protein and healthy fats, tomato sauce adds non-starchy veg, but the mashed potato in the scramble plus bread pushes carbs higher. A walk after will tame the peak nicely.]

Breakfast: Toasted ham and cheese sandwich [Coach: A classic mixto 🥪 — solid protein from the ham and melted cheese, modest carbs from the toast. Carbs ride a bit higher in the morning with dawn cortisol; a walk after would help cap the peak.]
